name: Country Chicken Ragout
recipeIngredient: 8 slices Extra-thick bacon, cooked and diced
12 Baby artichokes (fresh or frozen), cooked and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the oil over medium-high until hot.
2. Add the chicken breasts and sauté for 3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned.
3. Add pearl onions, mushrooms, bacon, and garlic. Sauté for 3 minutes.
4. Add baby artichokes, sun-dried tomatoes, tarragon, and pine nuts. Sauté for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in sherry and cook for 1 minute until reduced by one-quarter.
6. Add chicken stock and cook for 3 to 4 minutes until reduced by three-quarters.
7. Stir in heavy cream and cook for 2 to 3 minutes until the sauce thickens.
8. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
